select_when: An abstract recommendation needs a memorable causal story so people can understand why the change matters and what to do next.
Adoption depends on belief shift, identity shift, or coherent sequencing rather than on dumping more disconnected facts at the audience.
Scattered evidence needs to be turned into one clear line of meaning without losing the operational point.
The next move should make the causal logic legible while resisting the temptation to overclaim certainty.
avoid_when: Story coherence is outrunning evidence quality and a clean arc is making the audience feel more certainty than the proof warrants.
The narrative is compressing genuine uncertainty into false inevitability and making contingencies, trade-offs, or missing evidence disappear.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model focused on turning scattered evidence into coherent meaning while guarding against story quality outrunning proof quality.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader storytelling rhetoric because the raw source is strongest on causal legibility, adoption, and anti-false-inevitability discipline.
open_questions: The output type compresses a source that also spans pitch structure, internal struggle framing, and persona design.

select_when.note: The raw source is explicit on making abstract advice memorable, driving adoption through belief shift, and turning scattered evidence into a clear line of meaning.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are grounded in direct source warnings about narrative coherence outrunning evidence and uncertainty being erased.

input_type.note: The source clearly activates on meaning-making and adoption-framing problems, while the typed input remains a normalized routing label.

output_type.note: The source supports structured causal storytelling; the output label compresses that into a reusable intervention artifact.

reasoning_types.note: Narratives is strongest as diagnostic and systems-aware sensemaking rather than freeform persuasion.
